title: DIY Craft Self Healing Cutting Mat Double Sided Hobby Tool (2 Sizes and Colors)
description:
The ToolTreaux self-healing cutting mat is a hobby and craft essential for any DIY workspace. Designed to heal on its own, the mat’s surface is made from separate tiny pieces of materials to create a solid surface for you to cut on. Your cutting tool or blade will go between these tiny pieces to separate them instead of cutting into the surface of the mat. This durable, flexible material will prevent slippage during use. Each board features a built-in degree angle and grid layout guide to assist with tracing, folding, sewing, gift-wrapping, and more with precision and accuracy. The grid comes with both imperial and metric measurements so it will be compatible with most patterns and hobby crafts

DIY Craft Self Healing Cutting Mat Double Sided Hobby Tool (2 Sizes and Colors)

The ToolTreaux self-healing cutting mat is a hobby and craft essential for any DIY workspace. Designed to heal on its own, the mat’s surface is made from separate tiny pieces of materials to create a solid surface for you to cut on. Your cutting tool or blade will go between these tiny pieces to separate them instead of cutting into the surface of the mat. This durable, flexible material will prevent slippage during use.

Key Features

  • SELF-HEALING CUTTING MAT - Surface of the ToolTreaux cutting mat heals on its own; cuts, slices, and dices will leave no marks. Manufactured from separate tiny pieces to create a solid surface to cut on, will prevent the board from slipping during use
  • PRECISION GRID LAY OUT - Cutting board comes with a built-in grid and angle guide for tracing, sewing, folding, gift wrapping, and more with accuracy and precision. Grid features both imperial and metric measurements
  • PROTECT YOUR WORKSPACE - Cutting mat is designed to prevent damage to your work table, kitchen counter, desktop, or crafting area. Surface will absorb cuts and prevents your cutting tools from dulling
  • COMPACT SIZE - Mat measures 9” x 12", ideal for small workspaces. Use for precision cutting and designing with ease. Flexible material, easy to store in a toolbox or craft supplies kit when not in use
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Color: green; Dimensions: 9” x 12”; Thickness: .08”; Weight: .26oz; Material: self-healing surface; Measurements: imperial and metric

Product Specifications

  • MPN: UTSCM
  • UPC: 060886332183

Each board features a built-in degree angle and grid layout guide to assist with tracing, folding, sewing, gift-wrapping, and more with precision and accuracy. The grid comes with both imperial and metric measurements so it will be compatible with most patterns and hobby crafts.

These mats are ideal for preventing damage to your counter, work table, desktop, or crafting area. The surface will absorb cuts while also preventing your cutting tools and utility blades from dulling.

Measuring just 9” x 12”, these mats are great for smaller workspaces. They will easily fit inside toolboxes, craft kits, and storage supplies when not in use. Use them for precision cutting and designing with ease in your next craft and hobby project!
